description: Buy a global eSIM through chat. Agents earn USDT referral commissions across 192 countries.
name: io.github.roamzy-io/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Bearer token from /dashboard/settings if you want to bind agent activity to a pre-existing Roamzy account. Leave unset for anonymous-flow (default).
environmentVariables.name: ROAMZY_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Set to "true" when using a non-anonymous token to also expose purchase tools (roamzy_create_order). Anonymous-mode has purchase tools enabled by default.
environmentVariables.name: ROAMZY_ENABLE_PURCHASE

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Override the API base URL for staging or self-hosted deployments. Defaults to https://roamzy.io/api/v1.
environmentVariables.name: ROAMZY_API_BASE
